title: Genetics and Hair Fall: 8 Herbal Remedies for Prevention
description: Saponaria officinalis creams are often used to help with hair fall due to their rich content of saponins and other nutrients. These compounds help to strengthen hair follicles, promoting healthy growth and reducing shedding. Saponins, in particular, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can soothe the scalp and protect hair from damage.
